status_line: Monday 6:40 PM ET / 22:40 UTC — nineteenth hour. Three consecutive effectively quiet sweeps now on the books: SARAH Run 130 at 22:05 UTC posted zero deltas in SARAH-scope (Documents, Desktop SARAH-scope, output tree, naming, dupe set, open-items roster) — making it Runs 128, 129, and 130 all clean. Note that Run 130 ran without ~/Downloads mounted, so the four Downloads-resident Open Items (#7, #9, #15, #18) are assumed unchanged but not byte-verified this window. Top-level production count holds firm at 48 (51 total counting sarah-log.md and the two 0-byte test stragglers). Output tree at 1,064 files for the fifth straight push. The 12-item open-slate is fully stable. SARAH did flag one positive-direction signal: jarvis-state.json heartbeat resumed at 21:38 UTC after two silent runs (128, 129) — pipeline activity is back. dispatch-inbox.jsonl, however, is now silent for four consecutive runs (still 18:55 UTC) — likely just a normal-state artifact (no inbound voice messages). Creative wing dark cycle continues: ninth cycle since the 14:40 MAESTRO/WRITER/GUARDIAN drop. Lands' End now T-3 days; PARK Gallery deck and T2 v8 still GUARDIAN-unvalidated — that's still the urgency lane. hf_*.mp4 pair (#7 + #18) now ~25.4h and ~7.5h stale — bulk-adopt or bulk-ignore remains the highest-leverage one-line prompt. Repo still 5 commits behind origin locally; writable-clone workaround stays in play for this push.
